_meta.description: Canonical standards registry for NETA ETT study content. All standards_refs in study guide frontmatter must match an entry here. Ingestion scripts validate against this file.

standards.full_title: Standard for Acceptance Testing Specifications for Electrical Power Equipment and Systems
standards.scope: Acceptance testing procedures, test values, and frequency tables for electrical power equipment

standards.full_title: Standard for Maintenance Testing Specifications for Electrical Power Equipment and Systems
standards.scope: Maintenance testing procedures, test values, and frequency tables for electrical power equipment

standards.full_title: Standard for Electrical Commissioning of Electrical Power Equipment and Systems
standards.scope: Commissioning procedures for electrical power systems

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard for AC High-Voltage Circuit Switchers Rated 15.5 kV Through 245 kV
standards.scope: Ratings, construction, type tests, and production tests for circuit switchers

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard Test Procedure for AC High-Voltage Circuit Breakers
standards.scope: Test procedures for circuit breakers rated above 1000 V

standards.full_title: American National Standard for High Voltage Air Switches, Bus Supports, and Switch Accessories
standards.scope: Ratings, specifications, and tests for HV air disconnect switches

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard for AC High-Voltage Circuit Breakers Rated on a Symmetrical Current Basis - Preferred Ratings and Related Required Capabilities
standards.scope: Preferred ratings for circuit breakers

standards.full_title: Standard for Electrical Safety in the Workplace
standards.scope: Electrical safety requirements, arc flash, PPE, lockout/tagout

standards.full_title: National Electrical Code (NEC)
standards.scope: Electrical installation requirements

standards.full_title: IEEE Recommended Practice for Testing Insulation Resistance of Electric Machinery
standards.scope: Insulation resistance testing procedures for rotating machinery

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for Diagnostic Field Testing of Electric Power Apparatus — Part 1: Oil Filled Power Transformers, Regulators, and Reactors
standards.scope: Field testing procedures for oil-filled power transformers

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard for General Requirements for Liquid-Immersed Distribution, Power, and Regulating Transformers
standards.scope: General requirements for liquid-immersed transformers

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for Diagnostic Field Testing of Fluid-Filled Power Transformers, Regulators, and Reactors
standards.scope: Diagnostic field testing of fluid-filled transformers

standards.full_title: IEEE Recommended Practice for Establishing Liquid-Immersed and Dry-Type Power and Distribution Transformer Capability When Supplying Nonsinusoidal Load Currents
standards.scope: Transformer derating and capability evaluation under harmonic (nonsinusoidal) load currents

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for Field Testing and Evaluation of the Insulation of Shielded Power Cable Systems Rated 5 kV and Above
standards.scope: Omnibus cable testing guide — method selection, testing philosophy, evaluation

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for Field Testing of Shielded Power Cable Systems Using Very Low Frequency (VLF)
standards.scope: VLF withstand and tan delta diagnostic testing of MV/HV cables

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for Partial-Discharge Testing of Shielded Power Cable Systems in a Field Environment
standards.scope: PD testing methods, sensor types, PRPD pattern interpretation for cables

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for Field-Testing of Shielded Power Cable Systems Rated 5 kV and Above with Damped Alternating Current (DAC) Voltage
standards.scope: DAC voltage testing and diagnostics for shielded power cables

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for Bonding Shields and Sheaths of Single-Conductor Power Cables Rated 5 kV through 500 kV
standards.scope: Shield bonding methods, SVL selection, jacket testing for single-conductor cables

standards.full_title: Utility Shielded Power Cable Rated 5 Through 46 kV
standards.scope: Cable construction, bending radius, insulation levels for utility shielded power cables

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for Measuring Earth Resistivity, Ground Impedance, and Earth Surface Potentials of a Grounding System
standards.scope: Grounding system measurement procedures

standards.full_title: IEEE Recommended Practice for Protection and Coordination of Industrial and Commercial Power Systems (Buff Book)
standards.scope: Protection coordination for industrial/commercial power systems

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard for Metal-Enclosed Low-Voltage (1000 Vac and below, 3200 Vdc and below) Power Circuit Breaker Switchgear
standards.scope: LV metal-enclosed switchgear ratings and test procedures

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard for Metal-Clad Switchgear
standards.scope: MV metal-clad switchgear ratings and test procedures

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard for Metal-Enclosed Interrupter Switchgear Rated above 1 kV AC up to and Including 48.3 kV AC
standards.scope: MEI switchgear assemblies: interrupter switches, selector switches, power fuses, circuit breakers, control/instrumentation/metering, protective equipment

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for Testing Alternating Current Metal-Enclosed Switchgear for Internal Arcing Faults
standards.scope: Arc-resistant switchgear testing — Type 1, 2, 2B, 2C accessibility ratings and internal arcing fault test procedures

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard for Metal-Enclosed Bus
standards.scope: Metal-enclosed bus assemblies (nonsegregated-phase, cable bus, segregated-phase, isolated-phase) rated 1058 V through 38 kV, 600 A through 26000 A

standards.full_title: Standard Test Method for Dielectric Breakdown Voltage of Insulating Liquids Using Disk Electrodes
standards.scope: Dielectric breakdown voltage test for insulating oil

standards.full_title: Standard Test Method for Dissipation Factor (or Power Factor) and Relative Permittivity (Dielectric Constant) of Electrical Insulating Liquids
standards.scope: Power factor testing of insulating oil

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for the Application of Neutral Grounding in Electrical Utility Systems - Part I: Introduction
standards.scope: Neutral grounding application in three-phase electrical utility systems

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard Requirements for Power-Line Carrier Line Traps (30 kHz to 500 kHz)
standards.scope: Requirements for power-line carrier line traps used in PLC communication systems

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard Requirements for Overhead, Pad-Mounted, Dry-Vault, and Submersible Automatic Line Sectionalizers for AC Systems Up to 38 kV
standards.scope: Requirements for automatic line sectionalizers including ratings, design tests, and production tests

standards.full_title: Enclosures for Electrical Equipment (1000 Volts Maximum)
standards.scope: Enclosure types (1-13), environmental protection ratings, and test requirements for electrical equipment enclosures

standards.full_title: Industrial Control and Systems Controllers, Contactors and Overload Relays Rated 600 Volts
standards.scope: Selection, installation, and maintenance of controllers, contactors, and overload relays for industrial control systems

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard for Test Procedures and Requirements for Alternating-Current Cable Terminations Used on Shielded Cables Having Laminated Insulation Rated 2.5 kV Through 765 kV or Extruded Insulation Rated 2.5 kV Through 500 kV
standards.scope: Cable termination classification (Class 1/2/3), indoor/outdoor categories, voltage ratings, test procedures for MV/HV cable terminations

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard for Separable Insulated Connector Systems for Power Distribution Systems Rated 2.5 kV Through 35 kV
standards.scope: Separable insulated connectors (elbows): dead-front design, loadbreak/deadbreak/live break ratings, 200A/600A/900A current classes, interface types, color codes

standards.full_title: IEEE Standard for Extruded and Laminated Dielectric Shielded Cable Joints Rated 2.5 kV to 500 kV
standards.scope: Cable joint/splice classification, construction types (premolded, cold-shrink, heat-shrink, taped, field vulcanized), design test sequences, production testing requirements

standards.full_title: IEEE Recommended Practice for the Maintenance of Industrial and Commercial Power Systems
standards.scope: Maintenance program structure, RCM methodology, FMEA/FMECA, CBM vs TBM strategies, maintenance testing overview, standby power equipment maintenance

standards.full_title: IEEE Recommended Practice for System Grounding of Industrial and Commercial Power Systems
standards.scope: System grounding methods (ungrounded, HRG, LRG, hybrid, reactance, resonant, solid), grounding transformer sizing, generator grounding, UPS grounding. Successor to IEEE 142 Green Book Ch. 1

standards.full_title: IEEE Recommended Practice for Determining the Electric Power Station Ground Potential Rise and Induced Voltage from a Power Fault
standards.scope: GPR calculation methodology, induced voltage on communication/control circuits, zone of influence determination, shield factors, fault current considerations

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for the Application, Specification, and Testing of Phase-Shifting Transformers
standards.scope: Phase-shifting transformer application theory, single-core and two-core types, OLTC features, protection schemes, rating data, testing, tolerances, bid document checklist

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for the Evaluation and Reconditioning of Liquid Immersed Power Transformers
standards.scope: Transformer evaluation and reconditioning — risk assessment with fault tree analysis, 10 diagnostic tests (DGA, liquid quality, corrosive sulfur, solid insulation, C/PF/DF, FRA, PD, IR, DP, vibration), reconditioning procedures for 8 component areas, degassing and moisture removal, decision framework

standards.full_title: IEEE Guide for Cable Connections for Gas-Insulated Substations
standards.scope: Cable-to-GIS connections (72.5-550 kV) — termination types (fluid-filled, dry-type, pipe-type), dimensional tables, ratings, dielectric tests, mechanical force limits, grounding, field installation and acceptance procedures

standards.full_title: Condition Assessment of Power Transformers
standards.scope: Transformer condition assessment framework — TAIs, health indices, scoring matrices, component-specific assessment (active part, bushings, OLTC/DETC, cooling, insulating liquid), integration of multiple diagnostics into composite indices, remaining life estimation
